title: Friendly Farm Animals
description: A simple coloring page featuring basic farm animal shapes that helps children recognize common animals while practicing fine motor skills.
instructions: Color each animal using your favorite colors. Try to stay inside the lines. You can use the suggested colors or choose your own!

content.image: A farm scene with simple outlines of a cow, pig, chicken, sheep, and horse. Each animal is drawn with basic shapes and clear outlines perfect for young children to color.

elements.name: Cow
elements.description: The cow has black and white spots. Can you color the spots?

elements.name: Pig
elements.description: Pigs are often pink. You can color this pig pink or any color you like!

elements.name: Chicken
elements.description: The chicken has feathers. You can color it yellow, brown, or red.

elements.name: Sheep
elements.description: Sheep have fluffy wool. You can color the wool white or light gray.

elements.name: Horse
elements.description: Horses can be brown, black, or white. Which color will you choose?

learningFacts: Cows give us milk that we can drink
Pigs have curly tails and are very smart animals
Chickens lay eggs that we can eat
Sheep's wool is used to make warm clothes
Horses can run very fast and help people on farms
